name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: more on Wall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Team,

I wanted to follow up on the email my campaign manager Allen sent to you recently.

Not only is my Republican opponent, Kathaleen Wall's pay-to-play attitude all wrong for Texas -- her rhetoric is even worse.

In just the last month Wall:
* Thanked the coronavirus "for saving lives", because it created an excuse for Governor Greg Abbott to shutter Planned Parenthood and other reproductive health clinics in Texas.
* Released a dangerous ad attacking Chinese Americans for COVID-19 at a time when hate crimes against our AAPI community are already on the rise.

**These statements from Wall aren 't just outrageous, team. They're dangerous and disregard the safety and well-being of some of our most vulnerable residents.**

Scapegoating Asian Americans and celebrating the governor's attempts to block women from exercising their right to make their own health care choices is no way to campaign -- and it's no way to govern.

[**I know times are tough right now, but if you 're able to give a donation to our team to help us defeat Kathaleen Wall and her attempt to buy this election, we would be incredibly grateful.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/UC2pW7yYYlGKs0QPvSfm1H3Ib1panubYhhPVGE9jk8w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=15)

Thank you,
-Sri

On Thurs, Apr 16, 2020 at 3:31 PM **Allen Chen** wrote:
Fundraising reports are out and here's what we've learned about our potential GOP opponent.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/YabQH5PEeu7j8nxm4J5CNcIQKMQIhDIwD-QnbEGkLe4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=15)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/Li1IV-2TrM_phfZiRs3eiqrqTtZk8tQEbJ5H3AnpB4s=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

Fundraising reports are out and here's what we've learned about our potential GOP opponent.

**As of now, Kathaleen Wall has pumped $4.5 million dollars in personal loans to her campaign --_and more is likely to follow._** [**DONATE NOW TO SHOW YOU 'RE ON TEAM SRI!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/UC2pW7yYYlGKs0QPvSfm1H3Ib1panubYhhPVGE9jk8w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=15) | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/YabQH5PEeu7j8nxm4J5CNcIQKMQIhDIwD-QnbEGkLe4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=5)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/YabQH5PEeu7j8nxm4J5CNcIQKMQIhDIwD-QnbEGkLe4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=25)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/YabQH5PEeu7j8nxm4J5CNcIQKMQIhDIwD-QnbEGkLe4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=50)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/YabQH5PEeu7j8nxm4J5CNcIQKMQIhDIwD-QnbEGkLe4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=100)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/YabQH5PEeu7j8nxm4J5CNcIQKMQIhDIwD-QnbEGkLe4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=15)

Kathaleen Wall is looking to ensure her interests are put above the community's -- plain and simple, team.

With millions of dollars in personal checks and **a small-dollar donor rate of less than 0.0%, Wall is running a pay-to-play campaign to get her into Congress.**

Wall is just another mega-donor looking to buy influence and protect her own special interests. Her campaign isn't about helping everyday Texans -- it's about power and prestige.

We can't let Wall use her checkbook to put her agenda above the community's, team. Not when so much is at risk.

[**If you can, please donate to our campaign to bring true leadership to TX-22 by electing proven public servant -- Sri Preston Kulkarni.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/UC2pW7yYYlGKs0QPvSfm1H3Ib1panubYhhPVGE9jk8w=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=15)

[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/YabQH5PEeu7j8nxm4J5CNcIQKMQIhDIwD-QnbEGkLe4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=15)
---

Thank you for your help,
Allen

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/YabQH5PEeu7j8nxm4J5CNcIQKMQIhDIwD-QnbEGkLe4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=15)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/Yc61EQuLRO5I9mtCcwyObFvhIO-ZPVMuTMHlXzpQcEI=/YabQH5PEeu7j8nxm4J5CNcIQKMQIhDIwD-QnbEGkLe4=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.19_SPK_b1_all&amount=15)

Hello — I had hoped to share better news, but my team says we fell a bit short of our mid-month fundraising goal yesterday. **So, I am officially extending the deadline to see if we can close the gap by Sunday at midnight. **

body:
Your support as a Founding Member of Team Booker is more than just another donation.
We wanted to make sure you saw Charles' message below and had a chance to be a part of this: **[chip in $20.20 (or whatever you can afford) to our grassroots campaign today, and become a Founding Member.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17193627/185985841/1004722997?refcode=em20200419&amount=20.20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTM0NTk2Zi02NzgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VQYCoX6NnR3p6CrLAiEFyHi0HFvSHMqYLfvtPWzLho=)**
Your support as a Founding Member of Team Booker is more than just another donation.
As we go into the primary, it'll be more important than ever to show that our grassroots campaign – which stands for _real_ Democratic values like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and universal basic income – has strength in numbers.
**[Join us, and make a contribution to our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17193628/185985842/1004722997?refcode=em20200419&amount=20.20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTM0NTk2Zi02NzgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VQYCoX6NnR3p6CrLAiEFyHi0HFvSHMqYLfvtPWzLho=)** Become one of the early supporters who helped build this movement and changed the course of history in Kentucky.
Let's do this,
Team Booker
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Charles Booker**
Date: Fri, Apr 17, 2020
Subject: Will you become one of our founding members?
To: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
When I announced that I was running for U.S. Senate back in January, I knew that I was fighting an uphill battle. I didn’t have a lot of money or big-name connections in D.C., but I had a message and knew that there are a lot of people like me who are hungry for change.
And just over these past few months, our movement has grown to the largest it’s ever been. Our bold, progressive vision of Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and universal basic income continues to reach people everywhere -- and it’s allowed me to connect with and listen to some pretty incredible people.
**[I’m deeply appreciative and grateful for your support thus far, but I have an important ask: will you become a Founding Member of our grassroots campaign today and make a gift of $20.20 (or whatever you can afford)?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17193642/185985856/1004722997?refcode=em20200419&amount=20.20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTM0NTk2Zi02NzgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VQYCoX6NnR3p6CrLAiEFyHi0HFvSHMqYLfvtPWzLho=)**
****[Contribute $20.20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17193643/185985857/1004722997?refcode=em20200419&amount=20.20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTM0NTk2Zi02NzgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VQYCoX6NnR3p6CrLAiEFyHi0HFvSHMqYLfvtPWzLho=)****
Your support as a Founding Member of Team Booker is more than just another donation. It’s a concrete way to show that our grassroots, small-dollar campaign has real strength in numbers -- and to send a clear message to Mitch and his team that we’re ready to do whatever it takes to send them packing.
And as the primaries get closer, one thing is for certain: **it’s going to take a real Democrat -- like myself -- to drive Mitch out of power.** Not an establishment, milquetoast Democrat who isn’t willing to fight for the bold, progressive solutions we so strongly and proudly believe in.
But I’m proud to fight for these solutions, and I’m honored to fight every day alongside you and to take our power and our future back.
I want to make sure I remember your name as one of the early supporters who helped us build this movement and changed the course of history in Kentucky.
**[So: I hope you’ll consider joining my campaign as a Founding Member. Chip in $20.20 -- or whatever you can afford -- and let’s continue this work, together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17193644/185985858/1004722997?refcode=em20200419&amount=20.20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTM0NTk2Zi02NzgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VQYCoX6NnR3p6CrLAiEFyHi0HFvSHMqYLfvtPWzLho=)**
Yours in action,
Charles Booker

Friend,

We are facing a major threat. Democrats are four seats from taking the over the Senate, and Arizona's seat is at the top of their list. Liberal dark money groups have already poured tens of millions into our race, and I hate to say it, but it is having a MAJOR impact. [**Can you rush an urgent contribution and help us fight back?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A0MLw5adKDtbDZY44x019ZKESoj-LMQgRFLvIvFBuoEQE7JHbf3P4Ye9X7VD88CI3Qi0Mw2RZGJpDiAQjsiXQgFx55xEsap2JsSBQ7qcQKTif65IegQoLuUoLBj0bKfMoGq5XT92LOF52nmEjlWEsO7mbsP4lst83Lo2FYzhUhNfWbv5mykTWSP32ged1Vn57ZX8lyH0oHynVxKxV3yWRwTu2S2ZqMjzizG92VJMVMKNBuVlHdkdPnmK6TwxfypQxL6eF5PzDTsccJoqmSYeU1qDaflwiradg7gtkIyRhENLjXIjXDaa_7370bIcnp32cfVqxhdeipJ-1qzzmlofjD4olKF4TQIPJMZWkW4hVM6w-5gZQxsUACHRdIPlYXkLYfJrIcOTVSps7T_Iu0048TdZX2TV2GB1&c=KQQ-l3F-0E2m7x_ARHBSiBM_OAlzjvCJNuqJe1zrMZydSI8w16Yt4A==&ch=3nlOc2Dff6-uia3jaiAdy9EON3TVU9pVfC3XcMmmwYSXvSgSw_DfuA==)**
**

**

But we can't just sit around waiting for him to lose -- **[we have to bring the fight to him.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890326/7f51f7bc/4f70182a/4ef11a38/2380977030/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200419.1nd__1248__&amount=10")** That means nominating the right candidate: MJ Hegar. She's not a career politician -- MJ is a combat veteran and a working mom who went through two complicated pregnancies. She knows what working Texans have to deal with, because she's gone through it, too. Sen. Cornyn just doesn't get it.

And unlike Sen. Cornyn, MJ isn't taking any corporate PAC money. She's counting on this grassroots team to give her the support she needs to give him the fight of his career. So if you're able, please **[donate today to help us make sure MJ is the next senator from Texas.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890326/7f51f7bc/4f70182a/4ef11a38/2380977030/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNDgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200419.1nd__1248__&amount=10")**

\-- Team MJ

name: John Cornyn
subject: Your invitation
body:
Friend, I thought I'd try reaching out to you again...
This has always been very important to me, and, given present circumstances, couldn't be a more vital piece to our campaign.
You've been identified as someone I can trust a strong conservative who can be called upon to provide advice when the goings get tough.
...Someone I need to have in my corner.
Since we're not able to meet in person like I would prefer to, I thought re-opening our Leadership Team would be the next best thing.
**[I need you in this select group of conservative fighters, Friend. Will you join?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q3AMZKfDDkkFD9AHbUt1_Gl6f4GN6oORGa_8aGzIJ625asdkP1kbXSlhtiCZSBkeU8Y0qc8wDJ3IvSDPns61mBjqjhS33y2kUPy6bpPS62lizz8diEi7bukauSpBE1RyAfTSNnftH7e-WSU-8USdOtLXgrFrPisOnZHH5-XTP_5YtdkoiST0sOcAs_NoK9s8F7kBLRpQ2o-xR39W0Hx0wI3Do6ntx7IWFeXpF2b-LbDgK_QPe0KfvO2cgTlhcZZr-U6-UCdGAwP84rT2815_w27OWWp1eemj-bWmq3i2DuO1xfO3_71Op5fezrMntA1uRv80uxjwGRFxrJaJOeYVm6spC-iy7SEkZvwj5m4BpuOJM7iI0gY_Uw==&c=moI9QfSKYk0rnDoFqZ2qRpdt4u2O-QDcAVJ2lKgL-PSme_ParA4fdw==&ch=cEWHw1scXr0vOQhc7Z2INeoLyeIRyU0O8ly9GEDWEpKaFxNx77PUCw==)** **SPECIAL LEADERSHIP TEAM RE-OPENING** Nomination Code: Pending... [ **ACCEPT NOMINATION** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q3AMZKfDDkkFD9AHbUt1_Gl6f4GN6oORGa_8aGzIJ625asdkP1kbXSlhtiCZSBkeU8Y0qc8wDJ3IvSDPns61mBjqjhS33y2kUPy6bpPS62lizz8diEi7bukauSpBE1RyAfTSNnftH7e-WSU-8USdOtLXgrFrPisOnZHH5-XTP_5YtdkoiST0sOcAs_NoK9s8F7kBLRpQ2o-xR39W0Hx0wI3Do6ntx7IWFeXpF2b-LbDgK_QPe0KfvO2cgTlhcZZr-U6-UCdGAwP84rT2815_w27OWWp1eemj-bWmq3i2DuO1xfO3_71Op5fezrMntA1uRv80uxjwGRFxrJaJOeYVm6spC-iy7SEkZvwj5m4BpuPXZXRKJQXcJw==&c=moI9QfSKYk0rnDoFqZ2qRpdt4u2O-QDcAVJ2lKgL-PSme_ParA4fdw==&ch=cEWHw1scXr0vOQhc7Z2INeoLyeIRyU0O8ly9GEDWEpKaFxNx77PUCw==) [ **JOIN THE LEADERSHIP TEAM** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q3AMZKfDDkkFD9AHbUt1_Gl6f4GN6oORGa_8aGzIJ625asdkP1kbXSlhtiCZSBkeU8Y0qc8wDJ3IvSDPns61mBjqjhS33y2kUPy6bpPS62lizz8diEi7bukauSpBE1RyAfTSNnftH7e-WSU-8USdOtLXgrFrPisOnZHH5-XTP_5YtdkoiST0sOcAs_NoK9s8F7kBLRpQ2o-xR39W0Hx0wI3Do6ntx7IWFeXpF2b-LbDgK_QPe0KfvO2cgTlhcZZr-U6-UCdGAwP84rT2815_w27OWWp1eemj-bWmq3i2DuO1xfO3_71Op5fezrMntA1uRv80uxjwGRFxrJaJOeYVm6spC-iy7SEkZvwj5m4BpuPHk-mESGf6zg==&c=moI9QfSKYk0rnDoFqZ2qRpdt4u2O-QDcAVJ2lKgL-PSme_ParA4fdw==&ch=cEWHw1scXr0vOQhc7Z2INeoLyeIRyU0O8ly9GEDWEpKaFxNx77PUCw==) We need to make sure our campaign is stronger than ever.
Having all of my trusted supporters in one place, where I can call on them for advice gives us the strength we need to combat anything.
**[This offer won't be around much longer, Friend I need you to accept your nomination immediately!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q3AMZKfDDkkFD9AHbUt1_Gl6f4GN6oORGa_8aGzIJ625asdkP1kbXSlhtiCZSBkeU8Y0qc8wDJ3IvSDPns61mBjqjhS33y2kUPy6bpPS62lizz8diEi7bukauSpBE1RyAfTSNnftH7e-WSU-8USdOtLXgrFrPisOnZHH5-XTP_5YtdkoiST0sOcAs_NoK9s8F7kBLRpQ2o-xR39W0Hx0wI3Do6ntx7IWFeXpF2b-LbDgK_QPe0KfvO2cgTlhcZZr-U6-UCdGAwP84rT2815_w27OWWp1eemj-bWmq3i2DuO1xfO3_71Op5fezrMntA1uRv80uxjwGRFxrJaJOeYVm6spC-iy7SEkZvwj5m4BpuP0oWO6dQ2qeQ==&c=moI9QfSKYk0rnDoFqZ2qRpdt4u2O-QDcAVJ2lKgL-PSme_ParA4fdw==&ch=cEWHw1scXr0vOQhc7Z2INeoLyeIRyU0O8ly9GEDWEpKaFxNx77PUCw==) **
\- John Cornyn Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q3AMZKfDDkkFD9AHbUt1_Gl6f4GN6oORGa_8aGzIJ625asdkP1kbXVFeuYjybQJFInFlYs52LxxUJO03Wm0_jj6KZ9GVBASqRKaK7UcLbh-Q8glNxlumQjBxoIo8EQ0Ys5KseBo3Rn-HTtlYdlhvcAEsU1-6saRmSbxpxMHcwN4=&c=moI9QfSKYk0rnDoFqZ2qRpdt4u2O-QDcAVJ2lKgL-PSme_ParA4fdw==&ch=cEWHw1scXr0vOQhc7Z2INeoLyeIRyU0O8ly9GEDWEpKaFxNx77PUCw==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q3AMZKfDDkkFD9AHbUt1_Gl6f4GN6oORGa_8aGzIJ625asdkP1kbXdSn-oZYJ3U4uFce6YbPfSyzeflILRdo4e4cSogq_pJeuFdigtRxdBlx4-dp1YGiSwffbuu5YFeWITX_DAG855OamLNEJ1MlIz-hOS_n6sbW&c=moI9QfSKYk0rnDoFqZ2qRpdt4u2O-QDcAVJ2lKgL-PSme_ParA4fdw==&ch=cEWHw1scXr0vOQhc7Z2INeoLyeIRyU0O8ly9GEDWEpKaFxNx77PUCw==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q3AMZKfDDkkFD9AHbUt1_Gl6f4GN6oORGa_8aGzIJ625asdkP1kbXVFeuYjybQJFWJQsXVr6vgxBHI8NTQHM9H1uw-TkG3UseB_7rvAIB0qQDI4A5qtEMvJ5fU8fgD-MGeTaG7n_oroWa2AIoXPIEyBKBvbAuVefhhdCdWI8dRdHB0TMwBZzjQ==&c=moI9QfSKYk0rnDoFqZ2qRpdt4u2O-QDcAVJ2lKgL-PSme_ParA4fdw==&ch=cEWHw1scXr0vOQhc7Z2INeoLyeIRyU0O8ly9GEDWEpKaFxNx77PUCw==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q3AMZKfDDkkFD9AHbUt1_Gl6f4GN6oORGa_8aGzIJ625asdkP1kbXdv6J0qaYM3Zxi1XXAm0uEiUJDgjQsSs1ED0Cm2fUs_jvlKcw9hIav_gB1pREjpukauoHwX2T_AFZcXAhns-LhkXOeqGAyiqNhACS8eds-43yvf5qF8ccdBzhuAQ-Ujkhh90NQSYisKAPcuGSZsboTkIJQkjbpppXNgjtbiTa7Mphcz_ZE1MMPSBy7NE8IbVNqsWFX4GiB4qp57UbLuLUu1YuEKwN8m4g1dMUTL-oZ4NdS36BDexHvPlnFujbNYfcw==&c=moI9QfSKYk0rnDoFqZ2qRpdt4u2O-QDcAVJ2lKgL-PSme_ParA4fdw==&ch=cEWHw1scXr0vOQhc7Z2INeoLyeIRyU0O8ly9GEDWEpKaFxNx77PUCw==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate.Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. name: Jerid Kurtz
subject: this is outrageous corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We simply cannot let someone buy a U.S. Senate seat.
| | |
---
Friend,

The character of our democracy is at stake in Georgia's Senate race.
Our Republican opponent, Kelly Loeffler, is spending $20 million of her personal fortune to try and buy this seat.
**And if that wasn 't bad enough, news just broke that she's been cashing in on the coronavirus crisis - selling millions worth of stocks _just after_ she received a private, all-senators briefing on the dangers of the epidemic.**
Friend, outrageous corruption like this has no place in our government. We simply cannot let someone buy a U.S. Senate seat - and then use that office to make herself even richer. We _have_ to beat Kelly Loeffler and flip this seat blue.
**But here 's the harsh reality: The only way we'll overcome Kelly Loeffler's millions is if grassroots donors pitch in to support her Democratic opponent.**
Reverend Raphael Warnock is the strong leader Democrats need to flip this seat and take back the Senate. A pastor and community leader, he's running a people-powered campaign to restore moral leadership to Washington.
Right now, we're facing a critical mid-month deadline, and we're on track to fall $12,392 short of our goal.[ **_Please, will you chip in right away - as much as you can afford - to defeat Kelly Loeffler, flip this seat blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?_**](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e72b/288179be/a157c43/348e84d0/3631138580/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTU5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk159-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

The stakes in this race couldn't be higher: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that Democrats CAN flip the Senate - but it will all come down to winning in Georgia.

The contrast in this race couldn't be clearer.
Reverend Warnock grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. He went on to earn a college degree and worked his way up to serving as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.'s church. Now he has the chance to become the first black senator this state has ever elected.
We are in the fight for the soul of our nation's democracy. It's a tough fight - but it's a fight we can win. If we're going to take back the Senate from corrupt leaders like Kelly Loeffler and Mitch McConnell, we need to win here in Georgia. But we can't get it done without support from grassroots folks like you.
**[_So please, friend, will you chip in right now - as much as you can afford - to defeat Kelly Loeffler, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats? In a race this close, every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing - so thank you for pitching in._](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e72b/288179be/a157c43/348e84d0/3631138580/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTU5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk159-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

clean_body: We simply cannot let someone buy a U.S. Senate seat. | | | Friend, The character of our democracy is at stake in Georgia's Senate race. Our Republican opponent, Kelly Loeffler, is spending $20 million of her personal fortune to try and buy this seat. And if that wasn 't bad enough, news just broke that she's been cashing in on the coronavirus crisis - selling millions worth of stocks just after she received a private, all-senators briefing on the dangers of the epidemic. Friend, outrageous corruption like this has no place in our government. We simply cannot let someone buy a U.S. Senate seat - and then use that office to make herself even richer. We have to beat Kelly Loeffler and flip this seat blue. But here 's the harsh reality: The only way we'll overcome Kelly Loeffler's millions is if grassroots donors pitch in to support her Democratic opponent. Reverend Raphael Warnock is the strong leader Democrats need to flip this seat and take back the Senate. A pastor and community leader, he's running a people-powered campaign to restore moral leadership to Washington. Right now, we're facing a critical mid-month deadline, and we're on track to fall $12,392 short of our goal. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" The stakes in this race couldn't be higher: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms that Democrats CAN flip the Senate - but it will all come down to winning in Georgia. The contrast in this race couldn't be clearer. Reverend Warnock grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. He went on to earn a college degree and worked his way up to serving as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.'s church. Now he has the chance to become the first black senator this state has ever elected. We are in the fight for the soul of our nation's democracy. It's a tough fight - but it's a fight we can win. If we're going to take back the Senate from corrupt leaders like Kelly Loeffler and Mitch McConnell, we need to win here in Georgia. But we can't get it done without support from grassroots folks like you. "" Thanks for being with us, Jerid Kurtz Campaign Manager Warnock for Georgia | | "" | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Friend,

AOC is at it again...

Her socialist policies are influencing every aspect of politics. Now that Joe Biden is the presumptive Democratic nominee she believes that she can strong arm him into pushing her own radical agenda.

Let's be clear - in the last two years she has pushed policies like:
1. The Green New Deal.
2. The elimination of private health insurance.
3. Free college for illegal immigrants.
4. Late-term and federally funded abortions.
5. Open borders.

Now she is holding her support for Biden over his head with her socialist wishlist. Margaret Good for Congress

> Friend,

> [**But without in-person events, raising money is harder than ever. That’s why I need you, my online supporters, to step up and chip in a few bucks if you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17194388/186015566/-756790116?refcode=E2295-20200419-MidMo3-SL&amount=20.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2RmMjIyOS03NDgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=it_aySiuyFkiXVN7ZM4zocodk444-IZw1v1QU7td-aY=)
> This whole situation is exacerbated, because my team and I just got word that the national Republican rumor machine is spreading lies about my campaign in an effort to protect Vern Buchanan.
> [**They’ve seen the movement we’re building and they know we’re capable of flipping this district from red to blue -- and it terrifies them. Can you contribute right now to help us fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17194389/186015567/-756790116?refcode=E2295-20200419-MidMo3-SL&amount=20.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2RmMjIyOS03NDgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=it_aySiuyFkiXVN7ZM4zocodk444-IZw1v1QU7td-aY=)
> [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17194390/186015568/-756790116?refcode=E2295-20200419-MidMo3-SB&amount=20.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2RmMjIyOS03NDgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=it_aySiuyFkiXVN7ZM4zocodk444-IZw1v1QU7td-aY=)
> ---
> I’m running for Congress because we need a new type of balanced, nuanced leadership. Leadership that starts with solutions for our district’s issues, not petty, partisan battles. That’s what I will bring to Congress. And I’m working hard to spread this message to every voter in our district.
> **My team tells me we still need to raise $4,000 to keep us on track. And, as you know, we need every dollar to stay competitive with my Republican opponent.[Will you help me flip Southwest Florida blue and bring new leadership to our district? Contribute now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17194391/186015569/-756790116?refcode=E2295-20200419-MidMo3-SL&amount=20.2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2RmMjIyOS03NDgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=it_aySiuyFkiXVN7ZM4zocodk444-IZw1v1QU7td-aY=)**

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: #INThisTogether
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
There are truly amazing things happening in Indiana right now and there are incredible stories of sacrifice, resilience, and charity to be told. | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

Over the last month, we’ve been overwhelmed by the countless stories of Hoosiers coming together as a community in the face of the COVID-19 pandemic.

As you know, we’re making it part of our mission to share as many of these stories as possible with you and our grassroots community through our emails and social media accounts using the hashtag #INThisTogether.

Friend, we'll keep this short.

We are facing one of the toughest races in the nation. This is a top-tier, toss-up race, and it will come down to the wire.

[**We need 100 grassroots supporters to chip in $10 right now to help us keep up. Will you be the one to push us over the top?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OO0iwmj4Jl5JPKUaSwb2HcQCPvnebk6oK0LLupygupyQMJRsxSwFfHk85pic54MPKIaaZwTWXUUbhPY8Y7LSaiBCUTiuFdsspS_eRwkpYXrdVx7_raAoond-o9DqZD9Gdtp9HpJnZYqibRFBvKPDcrXfguMDeXGRMYyWlSzvwaTLG1yR3xa3Wkl4RdMeYGqLjmq6TbXli-BnQeRJDuGwJALqsSzKIruc7cWFD00jJugT7dDRWvr_GQ7rfsCO_DWL3xQKSxFsgAQu7skyQICKzU8oLxHMLBOt7eLaeF1W81_rFW-M_1G-gwZ6d_Hdk0BNjrS-IizkJHCFPFD_NTiSwqdpDXl6YdBb-un9IGa-zPQ=&c=WQTl2wgUQtzpldMFzQgsG_5XlNVVokkNsxklk0nJDLKca6ziTt03dg==&ch=iAY5fkXl5idOL1k9-50Go0KkwwCpimdqRCQMH1iAn5WbTk6sIqHBNA==)
Democrats are dumping millions of dollars in this race in order to keep this seat under their control. **That means we need to work twice as hard to win.** _With the support of dedicated conservatives from around the country, we can flip this seat_. [**Will you chip in $25, $15, even $10 to help us win this race?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OO0iwmj4Jl5JPKUaSwb2HcQCPvnebk6oK0LLupygupyQMJRsxSwFfHk85pic54MPKIaaZwTWXUUbhPY8Y7LSaiBCUTiuFdsspS_eRwkpYXrdVx7_raAoond-o9DqZD9Gdtp9HpJnZYqibRFBvKPDcrXfguMDeXGRMYyWlSzvwaTLG1yR3xa3Wkl4RdMeYGqLjmq6TbXli-BnQeRJDuGwJALqsSzKIruc7cWFD00jJugT7dDRWvr_GQ7rfsCO_DWL3xQKSxFsgAQu7skyQICKzU8oLxHMLBOt7eLaeF1W81_rFW-M_1G-gwZ6d_Hdk0BNjrS-IizkJHCFPFD_NTiSwqdpDXl6YdBb-un9IGa-zPQ=&c=WQTl2wgUQtzpldMFzQgsG_5XlNVVokkNsxklk0nJDLKca6ziTt03dg==&ch=iAY5fkXl5idOL1k9-50Go0KkwwCpimdqRCQMH1iAn5WbTk6sIqHBNA==) Thank you,

body:
Please read this entire email.

| Peter -- [**We need you to answer the poll at the bottom of this email. But, we need you to understand the whole picture before we ask you the question. PLEASE read this brief email, and then complete our one-click poll.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17194826/186039798/404768433?refcode=VC_UD_20200419_EMPOLL_E1_Whitmer_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmYzBlNWMyLTdlODItZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QHifuANm9rI6tyvD2Ch3R8RmriLEJX5T60zDMFrOxM4=&emci=f2640168-7a82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=efc0e5c2-7e82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4584036)

_Trump has gone too far this time._

**Trump is urging his base to "LIBERATE" states with Democratic Governors,** because of their stay-at-home safety measures in the COVID-19 epidemic. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17194827/186039799/404768433?refcode=VC_UD_20200419_EMPOLL_E1_Whitmer_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmYzBlNWMyLTdlODItZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QHifuANm9rI6tyvD2Ch3R8RmriLEJX5T60zDMFrOxM4=&emci=f2640168-7a82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=efc0e5c2-7e82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4584036) And now, NBC News reports that this has inspired the _WORST_ of Trump's base at a rally in Michigan: | **_NBC NEWS:_**
"The crowd included a variety of conservative and far-right icons, including "Don't Tread on Me" banners, Trump campaign flags and at least two Confederate flags. **Some people brought their assault weapons.**

**The crowd also chanted "Lock her up," referring to Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer, a Democrat who has often been criticized by Trump."**
---
[**But Michigan's Democratic Governor, Gretchen Whitmer, is SO BRAVE. She refuses to back down!!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17194828/186039800/404768433?refcode=VC_UD_20200419_EMPOLL_E1_Whitmer_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmYzBlNWMyLTdlODItZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QHifuANm9rI6tyvD2Ch3R8RmriLEJX5T60zDMFrOxM4=&emci=f2640168-7a82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=efc0e5c2-7e82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4584036)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17194829/186039801/404768433?refcode=VC_UD_20200419_EMPOLL_E1_Whitmer_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmYzBlNWMyLTdlODItZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QHifuANm9rI6tyvD2Ch3R8RmriLEJX5T60zDMFrOxM4=&emci=f2640168-7a82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=efc0e5c2-7e82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4584036)
Trump is terrified of strong Democratic leaders like Gretchen Whitmer.

He won't even acknowledge her by her name -- _he refers to her as "that woman from Michigan"_.

[**We're in awe by Gretchen Whitmer's leadership in this crisis, despite Trump's vicious and unhinged attacks. Some reports even say that she could be a Vice Presidential pick for Joe Biden! body:
The medical staff working on the frontlines of this crisis are nothing short of heroes, and we should be doing everything we can to support them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17194963/186044088/367027565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjkzNzIyMS04MjgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYExQmBbpA_Knqku5uBuEY06yGEAkeEYI9zHx4gNQog=&emci=fcff9c0c-3f82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=52937221-8282-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Team,

In the face of a global pandemic, our health care workers have stepped up to the challenge of protecting our communities. **The medical staff working on the frontlines of this crisis are nothing short of heroes, and we should be doing everything we can to support them.** | **🏥 _SUPPORT FRONTLINE HEALTH CARE WORKERS_ 🏥**

[**Sign our petition to support health care workers by calling on lawmakers to support policies that keep them safe!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17194964/186044089/367027565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjkzNzIyMS04MjgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYExQmBbpA_Knqku5uBuEY06yGEAkeEYI9zHx4gNQog=&emci=fcff9c0c-3f82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=52937221-8282-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) | **[Add My Name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17194965/186044090/367027565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjkzNzIyMS04MjgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYExQmBbpA_Knqku5uBuEY06yGEAkeEYI9zHx4gNQog=&emci=fcff9c0c-3f82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=52937221-8282-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249)**
---
Democrats across the country are joining together in support of health care workers by calling for more personal protective equipment (PPE) to keep these heroes safe, emergency childcare to ease the stress of working parents, and paid sick leave to ensure that no one loses pay just because they fall sick.

We must also take action to support health care workers in our communities through **[heeding the advice of the CDC](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17194966/186044091/-1368851855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjkzNzIyMS04MjgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYExQmBbpA_Knqku5uBuEY06yGEAkeEYI9zHx4gNQog=&emci=fcff9c0c-3f82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=52937221-8282-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=10203249) **and practicing social distancing. Each and every one of us has the ability to ease the burden on our health care system and help our health care workers manage this crisis by staying home.

**We know this is a trying time for so many people, and we are so immensely grateful to the frontline health care workers seeing us through this crisis.**

Thank you,

clean_body: The medical staff working on the frontlines of this crisis are nothing short of heroes, and we should be doing everything we can to support them. We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Team, In the face of a global pandemic, our health care workers have stepped up to the challenge of protecting our communities. The medical staff working on the frontlines of this crisis are nothing short of heroes, and we should be doing everything we can to support them. | 🏥 SUPPORT FRONTLINE HEALTH CARE WORKERS 🏥 | Democrats across the country are joining together in support of health care workers by calling for more personal protective equipment (PPE) to keep these heroes safe, emergency childcare to ease the stress of working parents, and paid sick leave to ensure that no one loses pay just because they fall sick. We must also take action to support health care workers in our communities through and practicing social distancing. Each and every one of us has the ability to ease the burden on our health care system and help our health care workers manage this crisis by staying home. We know this is a trying time for so many people, and we are so immensely grateful to the frontline health care workers seeing us through this crisis. Thank you, Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: | = Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. #
Hey, I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe during this difficult time. My team and I are working to adjust our strategy amid this new reality and continue our work to save Minnesota’s Senate seat. With that in mind, I wanted to share some news: **Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ recently released an analysis giving Democrats new hope that we have what it takes to flip the Senate.** While Republicans kicked off the election cycle with the upper hand, Democrats in key Senate races across the country are surging in the polls and outraising their GOP opponents. We currently hold the advantage when it comes to pick-up opportunities in states like Arizona, Colorado, North Carolina, Maine — and holding strong here in Minnesota, Michigan, New Hampshire, and more. That’s all thanks to grassroots supporters like you who have helped put Democrats like me on the path to victory. But with a few months left to go until Election Day, there is still a lot that can change — in our race and others. **Senate control could go either way, which means we must capitalize on our momentum. Can you pitch in $10 or more to help us save Minnesota’s Senate seat and take back the majority? name: MJ Hegar for Texas
subject: What real leadership looks like (and doesn't)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need real leadership for Texas -- someone who tells us the truth.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890325/7f51f7bc/4f72e6df/4ef11a33/1752285953/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, Sen. Cornyn's initial public response to COVID-19 is the _opposite_ of what real leadership looks like:
> **FIRST,** Sen. Cornyn **downplayed coronavirus,** tweeting a joke and a picture drinking a Corona beer.
| [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890325/7f51f7bc/4f72e6df/4ef11a32/1752285953/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200419.2nd__1254__&amount=10")
---
> **THEN,** he said this would be a **" piece of cake."**
>
> **NOW, there are over 600,000 cases and counting in the US -- more than three times as many as anywhere else in the world.**
**[**PITCH IN TO ELECT A REAL LEADER**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890325/7f51f7bc/4f72e6df/4ef11a32/1752285953/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200419.2nd__1254__&amount=10")**
This is all coming from a senator who was briefed about how deadly COVID-19 could be _weeks_ before his tweets making light of the situation. We NEED to replace Sen. Cornyn with someone who will listen to the experts and give Texans the truth. We need MJ.

**Donate to help her win the runoff and BEAT Sen. Cornyn this November.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Honoring the past by protecting our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/2pVPfxw-z0lzUBGaadmb8L72rUXnLPG5TGvxSS4yi4U=/L5iqUSnCamSkCMTgIOB4KNPrtQ6d9ZyE54BN0ItcHP8=)
---
| Brothers, sisters, and friends, While many of us are still dealing with unforeseen hardships as a result of COVID-19, I want to make sure we take a moment to observe two somber anniversaries: This week marks 13 years since the mass shooting at Virginia Tech and 21 years since the massacre at Columbine High School. Yet gun violence continues to plague American schools. **In fact, last month was the first March without a school shooting in the US since 2002.** **Let me be clear: It shouldn 't take schools closing their doors to prevent mass shootings.** **That 's why I have been a proud and vocal advocate for gun violence prevention measures in Congress.** I voted to ban large-capacity ammunition like the weapons used at Virginia Tech and Columbine, and to allow victims and their families to sue weapons manufacturers for the harm their guns cause. In honor of the victims lost in these devastating shootings, I vow to continue the fight for gun safety reform in Congress, so that all children can go to school free of worry. That is my promise to you. In service and solidarity, \-- Congressman Al Green
---
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/2pVPfxw-z0lzUBGaadmb8L72rUXnLPG5TGvxSS4yi4U=/dcLSekf24VwvEOYeDX4YhmpE5Ln_igQ5HjXgs-oarUE=) here.
---
| **[VISIT OUR WEBSITE](https://act.myngp.com/el/2pVPfxw-z0lzUBGaadmb8L72rUXnLPG5TGvxSS4yi4U=/L5iqUSnCamSkCMTgIOB4KNPrtQ6d9ZyE54BN0ItcHP8=)**
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
---
Keep Al Green in Congress
P.O. Box 56761
Houston TX 77256-6761 United States

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: At what point does this go too far?
body:
| | Peter, I’m going to say something I believe is fairly uncontroversial -- in the midst of a deadly pandemic, certain government actions are completely appropriate in order to protect our health. But at what point does this go too far? For example, as businesses are shuttered and elective surgeries are stopped in Michigan, their Governor has declared abortion an essential part of “life-sustaining” health care. In defending the arrest of 15 men for congregating for a rabbi’s funeral at a synagogue in New Jersey, the governor said that considering the Bill of Rights was “above his pay grade.” And congregants in Greenville, Mississippi were fined $500 each for attending a drive-in church service at a parking lot where they didn’t even need to get out of their cars. **Here’s the simple lesson we must heed from this -- as Christians, we can not afford to be indifferent or assume that our nation will be restored through the actions of others.** If we want our culture and government to enshrine and promote Judeo-Christian values, it’s our moral duty to be informed, vote from a Biblical worldview, and encourage others to do the same. **[Fulfilling this mission is why _My Faith Votes_ exists and 2020 is a vital year. Even in the midst of COVID-19, we’re pressing forward and could truly use your support. Will you make a tax-deductible donation of any amount today?](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200419apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200419apl01nd&n=1)** Here is just a sample of our key 2020 projects -- we’re activating 1 million new Christian voters in 11 swing states, equipping our youth on 300 Christian college and university campuses, and deploying an online voter guide for all 100,000 elections happening across the country in November because not everything that matters happens in Washington, D.C. At some point, and we pray it’s soon, we’re going to beat this virus. Hopefully, we’ll have a renewed appreciation for what’s truly important. In the meantime, we’ll be focused like a laser on 2020, and [your tax-deductible donation today would be greatly appreciated](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200419apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200419apl01nd&n=2). [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200419apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200419apl01nd&n=3) Thank you, and may God bless you. Sincerely, Jason Yates
---

Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

Hi Friend, Just wanted to make sure you had a chance to fill out our issues survey before we close it at midnight tonight. If you've already done so - thanks! The more information we have, the better we can address your concerns and perform as a campaign. It only takes a minute or two to fill out and it's extremely helpful! So scroll down, click the button and let us know your thoughts. \- Debi ***** Begin Forwarded Message *****
* * *
_Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is running to flip the open seat in the 17th District.[**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17195530/186073698/1282705599?refcode=041820_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjBlMWEzMi05MjgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6qt9AYh5y9YtNFyYYvX_BAFgaEy_EDQfJhtQE4mbOWs=)_

Hi Friend, It's been a couple of months since we asked for your views - and our world has changed dramatically since then. subject: You are invited to join Senator Cory Booker for a conference call this Wednesday.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Hey there, Senator Booker is hosting an important call this **Wednesday, April 22nd** at **5 p.m. EST** to discuss the federal response to COVID-19, talk about our path forward, and answer your questions. **[To dial into the call or join by video conference, you must RSVP in advance. Please RSVP here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/rsvp-for-a-call-with-cory?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+To+dial+into+the+call+or+join+by+video+c&utm_campaign=em200419&source=em200419")** Cory will be talking about the efforts he's helping to lead in the Senate, such as improving benefits and safety for essential employees, expanding unemployment insurance, fighting to get more protective equipment for health care workers, increasing funding for hospitals, and more. **[RSVP here to join the call on Wednesday. Space is limited so secure your spot on the call today.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/rsvp-for-a-call-with-cory?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+RSVP+here+to+join+the+call+on+Wednesday+&utm_campaign=em200419&source=em200419")** We hope you can join Cory on Wednesday. Talk soon,
Team Booker | [RSVP](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/rsvp-for-a-call-with-cory?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+RSVP&utm_campaign=em200419&source=em200419")

name: James Mackler
subject: Internet access is more important than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
but hundreds of thousands of Tennesseans are being left behind
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa16c/18d6a294/4cbda7b9/26d616c9/733858153/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | The current health crisis has made one thing crystal clear: We need equal access to the internet now more than ever. In the wake of the coronavirus pandemic, my family has been fortunate enough to be able to log online every day so that my wife and I can work from home and our daughters can attend virtual classes and do homework. But that's not the case for all Americans. [_**DEMAND BROADBAND ACCESS FOR ALL ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa16c/18d6a294/4cbda7b9/26d61636/733858153/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200421p_nat") Millions of Americans don't have access to broadband, particularly in rural areas. That means they can't go online to work, do schoolwork, go to virtual doctor appointments, order groceries and prescriptions, get important public health and safety information, and connect with family and friends. **Instead, they 're forced to rely on other internet options that are spottier, slower, or more expensive, or they have to go without the internet altogether.** Too many Americans are getting left behind. I'm in this race to be a senator for all Tennesseans -- no matter what your zip code is -- because we all need access to resources and opportunities to not only get by every day but to succeed and thrive. [_**Will you add your name to mine and call for expanded high-speed broadband access for all?**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa16c/18d6a294/4cbda7b9/26d61636/733858153/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200421p_nat") In service, James
---

|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: I won’t be intimidated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
I'm not afraid to call out the Communist Chinese Party for their deadly cover-up of COVID-19 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/23fe4d98647a/trump-announces-national-emergency-for-covid-642158?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi friend,

I love how our conservative community is not only level-headed but does not hesitate to lend support when the battle gets heated.

When I launched a campaign commercial calling out the Communist Chinese Party for their deadly cover-up and spread of COVID-19, the **progressive** and **socialist** **Democrats** responded in droves with vile and personal attacks. They seek to silence my message. **That will not happen**.

I will NOT be intimidated. I will NOT back down. With worldwide deaths approaching 200,000, **_China must be held accountable for what it has done._**
“ _We love Kathaleen's new ad taking on China! We completely agree. President Trump will be blessed to have another strong supporter in Congress_.”
**Bill and Beth**
“ _I am a Chinese American and a voter living in your district. I am also a Republican. In the campaign ad you didn't say anything wrong. You simply told the truth. I assure you that many Chinese Americans in your district support your message_ _in the ad. Please do not cave in and withdraw the campaign ad no matter what pressure you receive. Ms. Wall, thank you for telling the truth and thank you for defending our Constitution, our freedom, and our future_.”
**Bin**
“ _It is ironic that you should be criticized in the way you have been because we know personally how active you have been to support all people. Your Christian faith has been put into action through the generosity of you and Holly to support Houston Baptist University students_ ... _You and Holly specifically mentioned that you want your hugely generous scholarship funds to be directed towards students in science and engineering and especially towards minorities and other underrepresented peoples. It has been such a joy to give those scholarship dollars to women, Hispanics, African Americans, and Asian Americans. Thank you so much for all that you’ve done for so many_.”
**Mrs. and Dr. Robert B. Sloan**
**THANK YOU! **

**And THANK the many **others who have written or spoken out in support of me and the truth about China.

The Democrats, especially the likes of Pelosi and Schumer, continue to try and destroy America and un-do every HUGH SUCCESS President Trump has achieved. But your response confirms that principled people like **YOU and I** will ** NOT** back down.

With fearless and supportive people like **YOU** on our team, we WILL take back the House of Representatives. With YOUR SUPPORT, I will make it to Washington as your Congressional Representative and a reinforcement for President Trump.

YOU and I together will defeat the Democrats, secure our border, defend the unborn, protect the Second Amendment, and ensure that President Trump’s **_entire_** agenda is enacted.

**THANK YOU for standing with me and President Trump to #KeepAmericaGreat.**

God bless you,

Kathaleen Wall
Republican Candidate for Congressional District 22
---
|
---
|
---
| [Volunteer](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=d9edea51ff&e=01c99b7fbd "Volunteer")

name: STOP MISINFORMATION [via 314]
subject: we need your help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| Hey, remember when we had a competent, decent president?

Now, amid the coronavirus pandemic, we are saddled with a childish imbecile who uses his daily press briefings to trumpet false claims, spread misinformation, and promote propaganda.

**We 've had enough of these briefings, but the national press continues to air Trump's dangerous daily briefings.**

[Demand that networks stop airing Trump's coronavirus briefings live by adding your name here->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7c/4bd7760e/5ad33587/77af5add/1646938218/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Demand+that+networks+stop+airing+Trumprs&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing")

| [Sign On](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7c/4bd7760e/5ad33587/77af5adc/1646938218/VEsE/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Sign+On&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing")
---

* * *

Let's recap all of the nonsense Trump has claimed during these press briefings.

* That chloroquine was approved to treat COVID-19 -- FALSE
* Blamed hospitals for shortages in medical supplies -- FALSE
* Said there were no warnings or preparation heeds -- VERIFIABLY FALSE
* Contradicted leading health experts -- JUST DANGEROUS

**It comes down to this: the national press is doing a huge disservice to the American people by broadcasting these briefings live.**

They run the risk of being complicit in Trump's misinformation campaign if they continue to run these briefings.

[It's time to pull the plug on these briefings. Demand networks stop airing Trump's coronavirus briefings live->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7c/4bd7760e/5ad33587/77af5adb/1646938218/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Itrsquos+time+to+pull+the+plug+on+these+&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing")

[STOP MISINFORMATION](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7c/4bd7760e/5ad33587/77af5ada/1646938218/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-networks-stop-airing-trumps-coronavirus-briefings-live-trumps-continuous-lies-spread-dangerous-misinformation?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-trumpbriefingja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+STOP+MISINFORMATION&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing")
---

Thank you,

314 Action

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7c/4bd7760e/5ad33587/77af5ad9/1646938218/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing&source=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing&refcode=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1.77 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7c/4bd7760e/5ad33587/77af5ad8/1646938218/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing&source=314_EM_JA_200419_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_Trumpbreifing")** to make a donation.

clean_body: | Hey, remember when we had a competent, decent president? Now, amid the coronavirus pandemic, we are saddled with a childish imbecile who uses his daily press briefings to trumpet false claims, spread misinformation, and promote propaganda. We 've had enough of these briefings, but the national press continues to air Trump's dangerous daily briefings. "" | "" Let's recap all of the nonsense Trump has claimed during these press briefings. That chloroquine was approved to treat COVID-19 -- FALSE Blamed hospitals for shortages in medical supplies -- FALSE Said there were no warnings or preparation heeds -- VERIFIABLY FALSE Contradicted leading health experts -- JUST DANGEROUS It comes down to this: the national press is doing a huge disservice to the American people by broadcasting these briefings live. They run the risk of being complicit in Trump's misinformation campaign if they continue to run these briefings. "" "" Thank you, 314 Action Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. subject: we need to support frontline workers [ADD YOUR NAME]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
The COVID-19 crisis reminds us all of just how important essential workers are to keeping our communities safe and healthy.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/A0OQlLMVVodVonpKKk71zUCYBO7ANgYMUf5yXQiNUis=/PoR3kheCq-r8aKIFw6LYMV8T6AR9PjJ5ZY38AjKbfA0=)

[✎ **ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND SUPPORT FOR FRONTLINE WORKERS **✎](https://act.myngp.com/el/A0OQlLMVVodVonpKKk71zUCYBO7ANgYMUf5yXQiNUis=/PoR3kheCq-r8aKIFw6LYMV8T6AR9PjJ5ZY38AjKbfA0=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/A0OQlLMVVodVonpKKk71zUCYBO7ANgYMUf5yXQiNUis=/PoR3kheCq-r8aKIFw6LYMV8T6AR9PjJ5ZY38AjKbfA0=)
* * *

The COVID-19 crisis reminds us all of just how important essential workers are to keeping our communities safe and healthy.

From nurses and doctors who are taking care of the ill, to grocers and farmers who are keeping us fed, to first responders who are keeping us safe -- we owe a huge debt of gratitude to the essential workers on the frontlines.

**That 's why Congressman Stanton is calling on Congress to take real action to support these frontline workers by increasing the supply of personal protective equipment, providing paid sick leave, and allowing for emergency child care to support these heroes. **

[**Will you add your name to this petition to join Greg in demanding support for our frontline workers?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/A0OQlLMVVodVonpKKk71zUCYBO7ANgYMUf5yXQiNUis=/PoR3kheCq-r8aKIFw6LYMV8T6AR9PjJ5ZY38AjKbfA0=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/A0OQlLMVVodVonpKKk71zUCYBO7ANgYMUf5yXQiNUis=/PoR3kheCq-r8aKIFw6LYMV8T6AR9PjJ5ZY38AjKbfA0=)

Thank you!

\-- _Team Stanton _

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: Are you kidding me?
subject: BREAKING NEWS: Nancy Pelosi likes...?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
.
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04ec/72412298/4ffce2c5/6104f1e1/2874666851/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1")

| | You scream, I scream, the GOP screams for... ICE CREAM?! You scream, I scream, the GOP screams for... ICE CREAM?! **The GOP is always fast to criticize Nancy Pelosi, but now they have a new favorite talking point: her ice cream stash!** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04ec/72412298/4ffce2c5/6104f1e0/2874666851/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/vpp_em_en_200419_icecream_u1_x1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1") The GOP is so desperate to attack Nancy Pelosi, they'll _**LITERALLY**_ find anything. This time they're attacking her for liking...ice cream? Let's have some fun with this, Peter -- [**we want to know: what's your favorite ice cream flavor?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04ec/72412298/4ffce2c5/6104f1e3/2874666851/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/vpp_em_en_200419_icecream_u1_x1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+we+want+to+know+whats+your+favorite+ice+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1") [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04ec/72412298/4ffce2c5/6104f1e2/2874666851/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/vpp_em_en_200419_icecream_u1_x1?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1") Hope you're staying safe and happy (with an ice cream stash of your very own)! \-- Voter Protection Project
---

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04ec/72412298/4ffce2c5/6104f1e5/2874666851/VEsD/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_200419_IceCream_U1_X1")

name: Team Tina
subject: Did you send your answer to Tina?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Folks, Tina reached out a short while ago asking you to fill out our April Priorities Survey. We were blown away by the responses — so, we figured we’d give you one final chance to share your thoughts with us. **[Tomorrow, we’ll be sitting down with Tina (virtually!) to go over our priorities and strategy for the next couple of months. But before we do, it’s important that we get your feedback. Click here to fill out our short priorities survey:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17196024/186116832/464644164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E1OGViOS1hYTgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfxajrVIK_Z0EzdzD6HENKjy-dftoES12vr1ShZIIuM=&emci=21a58eb9-aa82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=27a58eb9-aa82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17196025/186116833/464644164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E1OGViOS1hYTgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfxajrVIK_Z0EzdzD6HENKjy-dftoES12vr1ShZIIuM=&emci=21a58eb9-aa82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=27a58eb9-aa82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)
---
Tina’s biggest priority is to make sure this campaign is about you and fighting for your interests in Washington. And Tina sure wishes she could sit down and grab a coffee with each and every one of you to hear about your concerns.
But with social distancing understandably in place, the next-best way for Tina to know what’s on your mind is through our quick priorities survey.
**[Will you take a minute to let Tina know what issues matter most to you in this race and where you’d like to see our campaign go? We literally cannot do our job without your input — so please, fill out our survey today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17196026/186116834/464644164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2E1OGViOS1hYTgyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rfxajrVIK_Z0EzdzD6HENKjy-dftoES12vr1ShZIIuM=&emci=21a58eb9-aa82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=27a58eb9-aa82-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)**

Hi Friend, The first quarter FEC fundraising numbers are in and our strong grassroots momentum has clearly made DeFazio's corporate donors nervous. DeFazio raked in major campaign cash from corporate donors like Dow Chemical, International Paper, UPS, FedEx, Proctor & Gamble, Nike, US Steel, Burson-Marsteller, K & L Gates, Ameri-Source Bergen and Moda Health Insurance PACs. As the #1 favorite of the airlines in Congress, DeFazio also cashed $45,000 in campaign contributions from airline executives, airlines, and industry PACs. It's no surprise that these companies are spending big against me. In fact, I have tangled with some of them personally - for example, supporting the community downstream of Dow's Midland, Michigan chemical plant who were poisoned by dioxin pollution in their demands for a cleanup. I will never forget driving through those working class neighborhoods and our host pointing out how many people either had cancer, or had already died from it. That's why we're in this fight. We need a representative that represents us, not big corporations or industry lobbyists. Our team is working around the clock to get the word out about the upcoming voter registration deadline (April 28!!) and vote-by-mail election (May 19!!), and we are backed by people like you. Every day I am on the phone for hours, talking with Oregonians about what is at stake, and I can't do it without your support. **[We're coming up short on our April goal of $20,000. If you can donate, I need your support now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GAE/ni0YAA/t.312/xPgw4hOsQ9WOoZxDp3pPqw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v05-2Fi7D9J-2Fqhj-2F46hEBctJ7P-2FqeWsVA6iVYTz9NXF04yBMZQPVgEN-2Fkj3wTlX4eMmou7Ay8BJNVw7-2BMaYkAYqmnYSaKFbZuTROZR6i-2F7Lh1SHP2uqJEbkeA1CETDaNP86Z-2BR763veJsK30nGgigtECnVtDK2XFNiOX-2BUEnIbw-2FzfZBZndKFX9d2-2FJCFDZ1-2BnbF5MtSEez3bWHd2pNXU-2BEUCw-3D-3D/-fuX)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: 🙋 Ready to vote this week?
body:
Have you requested an absentee ballot? The first day to vote is this Thursday, April 23. Exercise your civic duty and cast your ballot for #TeamBret!

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3v0TTAKWw2E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489
For months, the Communist Chinese government misled the world and we're now facing deadly consequences at home. China only cares about China. We need to come together as Americans, face facts, and realize the growing threat.

https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489
Hello

I hope you and your family are doing well and staying healthy.

Because there's no school, sports, or routine right now, it might seem like the world has stopped. But the election keeps going!

We have just SIX WEEKS to go until Primary Day, but did you know voting starts THIS THURSDAY?

Iowa's Secretary of St
ate and your County Auditors' offices are working very hard to make sure you and your neighbors can safely cast your ballot by absentee before June 2nd. Don't let all their hard work go to waste.

Request your absentee ballot TODAY, fill it out for #TeamBret, and send it back to your County Auditor.
ABSENTEE BALLOT REQUEST (https://sos.iowa.gov/elections/electioninfo/absenteeinfo.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489)
Don't wait to vote this time around. With limited polling locations in June, you won't want to waste time waiting in line to make your voice heard.

No matter how you vote, keep in mind those who haven't yet been liberated. In Communist China, over one billion people don't have that right. Their voices have been silenced. When the people don't get a say, you get runaway centralized government that puts the people's wishes last.

Everyday there's a bit more information that comes out about how China tried to cover up what they knew about COVID-19. But for decades, this has been the playbook. China has been lying about their human rights abuses, trade manipulation, and cybercrime against the American homeland.

For far too long we've blindly trusted China. The Communist Party will starve their own people if it means they can have more power. What do you think they will do to us Americans if we get in their way?

Your right to vote is precious. Use it and make a difference. Otherwise, we might get an out-of-control government that could care less what the people think.

May God continue to watch over you and bless our great country.
TELL FIVE FRIENDS (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489)
LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489)
EMAIL ME A QUESTION (mailto:bret@RichardsForCongress.com?subject=Keeping%20in%20touch)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

Even during these times, our campaign continues to be the most accessible to any Iowan. I truly care about what's important in your lives.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
p.s. We need you to keep telling more people about our campaign. As we shift to a more virtual campaign, we need you to help us spread our message on Facebook, Instagram, or however you communicate with others from home.
RECENT COVERAGE

https://richardsforcongress.com/richards-we-can-take-comfort-in-temporary-safety-but-our-god-given-liberties-must-remain-eternal/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489

https://theiowastandard.com/richards-we-can-take-comfort-in-temporary-safety-but-our-god-given-liberties-must-remain-eternal/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489
"At the next possible moment, the legislature needs to reconvene, re-examine these broad emergency powers, and decide which of our rights cannot be infringed...[These questions are] important to have answers to now so we’re not blindsided when the wrong person gets in charge. Because while we can take some comfort in this temporary safety, we know our God-given liberties must remain eternal."
STAY INFORMED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PyVqQEvzX0E&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489

On the issues:
* Protecting Life (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&t=94s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489)
* Lowering Healthcare Costs (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VKawyHECZVI&t=5s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489)
* Securing the Border (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2feYd5WAXtU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489)
* Sticking up for Iowa Energy (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w1HB4hYMDUQ&t=1s&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489)
* and much more... (https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLg6ycE8yzCF0tZeOk5rwVMemYssZoNXHy&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489)

GET INVOLVED
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RU58q_EtpqU&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489
YARD AND BARN SIGNS NOW AVAILABLE! EMAIL INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (mailto:info@richardsforcongress.com) TO GET YOURS TODAY!
We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489) we still need your help!

Serve as a neighborhood team captain? Know a good place for a barn sign? Send an email to volunteer@richardsforcongress.com (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=5ebbc50553&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489) to lend a hand!

Be sure to like us on Facebook (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489) and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/richards4iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489) and Instagram (http://instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=3d8e964dcf-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-3d8e964dcf-25822489) to stay up to date!
