clean_body: Have you requested an absentee ballot? The first day to vote is this Thursday, April 23. Exercise your civic duty and cast your ballot for #TeamBret! For months, the Communist Chinese government misled the world and we're now facing deadly consequences at home. China only cares about China. We need to come together as Americans, face facts, and realize the growing threat. Hello I hope you and your family are doing well and staying healthy. Because there's no school, sports, or routine right now, it might seem like the world has stopped. But the election keeps going! We have just SIX WEEKS to go until Primary Day, but did you know voting starts THIS THURSDAY? Iowa's Secretary of St ate and your County Auditors' offices are working very hard to make sure you and your neighbors can safely cast your ballot by absentee before June 2nd. Don't let all their hard work go to waste. Request your absentee ballot TODAY, fill it out for #TeamBret, and send it back to your County Auditor. ABSENTEE BALLOT REQUEST () Don't wait to vote this time around. With limited polling locations in June, you won't want to waste time waiting in line to make your voice heard. No matter how you vote, keep in mind those who haven't yet been liberated. In Communist China, over one billion people don't have that right. Their voices have been silenced. When the people don't get a say, you get runaway centralized government that puts the people's wishes last. Everyday there's a bit more information that comes out about how China tried to cover up what they knew about COVID-19. But for decades, this has been the playbook. China has been lying about their human rights abuses, trade manipulation, and cybercrime against the American homeland. For far too long we've blindly trusted China. The Communist Party will starve their own people if it means they can have more power. What do you think they will do to us Americans if we get in their way? Your right to vote is precious. name: Mike Franken
subject: Tuesday's the big day

body:
We have a TV ad going live on Tuesday. I think you got an early peek at it, but if not, please take a look: Click here for your sneak peek!
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello crew! We have a TV ad going live on Tuesday. I think you got an early peek at it, but if not, please take a look: [_**Click here for your sneak peek!**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a0/33365068/4a753daf/3f8bf55c/3671899929/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200419_adpreviewkick_em_fr_all_L1") This ad, and variations of it, will be aired for the next 40-plus days. We all know that surviving the pandemic and then rebuilding our economy will take a massive effort. This is the time for proven leadership in Washington, and especially, leadership in the legislative arena. Everyone in Iowa needs to know that we have a very clear choice between promised leadership and proven leadership, rookies in the legislative process and a leader in congressional affairs. The options are very stark. **I 'm ready, but I need your help to get the word out. Donations before midnight on Tuesday will buy more air time, inform more voters, and help bring in the right leader. Can you donate to our campaign? ** Thank you and very respectfully, Admiral Mike \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Kimberley Boggus
Date: Thurs, Apr 16, 2020 at 2:31 PM
Subject: Sneak preview Hello everyone. We said we were going to send our most dedicated supporters early access to our TV ad. Well, here it is, and thank you for a [_**donation to ensure it gets plenty of air time:**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a0/33365068/4a753daf/3f8bf55d/3671899929/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200419_adpreviewkick_em_fr_all_l2") [](secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200419_adpreviewkick_em_fr_all_vid) This is the first TV ad presented by any candidate in the 47-day homestretch before the primary on June 2. Admiral Mike is committed to ensuring Iowans know that he provides the leadership and experience needed to rebuild and rejuvenate America after the pandemic. Yup, he is the real deal! Voters will get a clear picture of what Admiral Mike stands for, why he's the right person to assume the leadership role for Iowa in the Senate, and what he can do for this state and our nation. [_**Our Ad Fund is open, and we 're looking for resources to keep this ad online for the next seven weeks. We're asking you, and the rest of our grassroots network, to donate $5, $10, or whatever you can to help us reach every voter in Iowa.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a0/33365068/4a753daf/3f8bf55e/3671899929/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200419_adpreviewkick_em_fr_all_L3") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a0/33365068/4a753daf/3f8bf55f/3671899929/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?amount=5&express_lane=true?refcode=FRA_20200419_adpreviewkick_em_fr_all_abx5")
---
[DONATE $10 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a0/33365068/4a753daf/3f8bf558/3671899929/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?amount=10&express_lane=true?refcode=FRA_20200419_adpreviewkick_em_fr_all_abx10")
---
[DONATE $25 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a0/33365068/4a753daf/3f8bf559/3671899929/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?amount=25&express_lane=true?refcode=FRA_20200419_adpreviewkick_em_fr_all_abx25")
---
[Other Amount >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a0/33365068/4a753daf/3f8bf55a/3671899929/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?amount=15&refcode=FRA_20200419_adpreviewkick_em_fr_all_abxother")
---
Thank you,
Kimberley Boggus
Campaign Manager

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a0/33365068/4a753daf/3f8bf55b/3671899929/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200419_adpreviewkick_em_fr_all_ftr")
---

| Paid for by Franken for Iowa
